hero.headline: "They get shit done."
hero.sub: We're Phoebe and Biraj. We run Amazon for brilliant brands. Two people. 15 years. No juniors.

testimonialsSection.heading: Don't take our word for it.

whoWeAre.heading: We're Phoebe and Biraj.
body: Phoebe spent 15 years at Moët Hennessy, Heineken, and Belvedere. Biraj built an Amazon brand from nothing and sold it for seven figures. We started Purpose Brands because every Amazon agency we met was either too big to care or too small to deliver.
We only work with food, drink, and wellness brands. We only work on Amazon. And you only ever work with us. That's it.

items.title: We have a chat
items.body: 30 minutes. We'll ask about your brand, your Amazon, and what's not working.

items.title: We do a free audit
items.body: We look at your listings, your ads, your storefront, and tell you what we'd change.

items.title: If we're a fit, we get to work
items.body: Same day if you want. No 12-week onboarding.

items.title: We run your Amazon
items.body: Day-to-day management of your Vendor or Seller account. Weekly updates. Monthly reporting. All the boring stuff that actually matters, handled.

items.title: We spend your ad budget like it's ours
items.body: Because wasting money on ads that don't convert is painful. We run your Sponsored Products, Brands, and Display — and we actually watch what's happening.

items.title: We make your Amazon look like your brand
items.body: Storefronts, A+ content, product pages. Your Amazon should look as good as your website. Right now, it probably doesn't.

items.title: We get your products found
items.body: Titles, bullets, keywords, images — optimised so people actually find you when they search. No dark arts. Just the work.
